title: Property Consultant - Mahagun Group - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Mahagun Group - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Mahagun Group has an exciting opening for a Property Consultant at our Howrah office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Mahagun Group:
Mahagun Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahagun Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
